mapper.select: SELECT sum(amount) sum_asset, sum(CASE WHEN asset_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) saving_asset, sum(CASE WHEN asset_type != 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) invest_asset FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{param1}
SELECT (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_type' AND d.`code` = asset_type LIMIT 1) TEXT, sum(amount) VALUE FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{param1} GROUP BY asset_type

SELECT (SELECT d.`value` FROM t_sys_dict d WHERE d.type = 'asset_status' AND d.`code` = asset_status LIMIT 1) TEXT, sum(amount) VALUE FROM t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{param1} GROUP BY asset_status
select asset_name text, amount value from t_asset_ledger WHERE asset_owner = #{param1} order by amount desc
select asset_name, amount asset_amount, invest_amount from t_asset_ledger where asset_type != 1 and asset_owner = #{param1}
